title: Outbound Cold Calling Agent with TCPA Compliance
description: An outbound voice AI agent that autonomously places cold calls from a lead list, qualifies prospects, books meetings through function calls, and enforces DNC/TCPA compliance rules including automatic suppression list management and calling-window restrictions.

tools.name: book_meeting
tools.description: Books a meeting with a qualified prospect

tools.name: mark_callback
tools.description: Marks the lead for a callback at a later time

tools.name: mark_not_interested
tools.description: Marks the lead as not interested and removes from calling list

tools.name: honor_dnc
tools.description: Adds the contact to the Do Not Call suppression list
